Custom Gym Wear Manufacturing in Pakistan

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

The fitness apparel market is booming — valued at over $350 billion globally. Whether you're launching a gym brand, CrossFit line, or yoga collection, the quality of your manufacturing directly impacts customer retention. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture custom gym wear with performance fabrics, compression technology, and construction built for intense training. MOQ from 50 pieces.

Fabric Options for Gym Wear

FabricCompositionBest ForProperties
Dri-Fit Polyester100% PolyesterHIIT, cardioUltra-lightweight, quick-dry
Compression Blend85% Poly, 15% SpandexWeightliftingMuscle support, circulation
Nylon-Spandex78% Nylon, 22% SpandexYoga, PilatesSecond-skin feel, 4-way stretch
Cotton-Poly Blend60% Cotton, 40% PolyLifestyle gym wearSoft, breathable, casual
Bamboo PerformanceBamboo/SpandexEco gym brandsAntibacterial, sustainable

Compression vs. Relaxed Fit

Compression Fit

Tight against the skin. Reduces muscle vibration, improves blood flow, enhances recovery. Best for: weightlifting, CrossFit, HIIT, running. Typically 15-20% spandex content.

Relaxed Fit

Looser, more comfortable. Better airflow, less restrictive. Best for: general gym wear, yoga, lifestyle athletic. Typically 5-10% spandex content.

Fitted (In-Between)

Follows body contours without compression. Most versatile option. Best for: retail brands, all-purpose training. Typically 10-15% spandex content.

Gym Wear Products We Manufacture

  • Leggings: High-waist, squat-proof, hidden pockets, seamless options
  • Sports Bras: Low/medium/high impact, removable padding, racerback
  • Shorts: Compression, running with liner, biker shorts, relaxed gym shorts
  • Tanks & Tees: Muscle tanks, drop armhole, fitted performance, oversized
  • Hoodies & Jackets: Lightweight gym hoodies, zip-ups, track jackets
  • Matching Sets: Coordinated sports bra + legging, shorts + crop top
